task_completion.description: Create the 'jewelry_material' attribute with Dropdown input and specified options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the attribute creation/edit page for 'jewelry_material'. The 'Catalog Input Type for Store Owner' should be 'Dropdown', and the 'Manage Options' section should list Gold, Silver, Bronze, and Platinum. Storefront Properties should ideally show it as Filterable and Visible.

task_completion.description: Create the 'gemstone_type' attribute with Dropdown input and specified options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the attribute creation/edit page for 'gemstone_type'. The input type should be 'Dropdown', and the options should list Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire, and None. Storefront Properties should ideally show it as Filterable and Visible.

task_completion.description: Create the 'chain_length_inches' attribute with Text Field input.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the attribute creation/edit page for 'chain_length_inches'. The input type should be 'Text Field'. Storefront Properties should ideally show it as Visible.

task_completion.description: Create a new Attribute Set named 'Jewelry' based on the Default set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Attribute Sets' grid showing 'Jewelry' in the list, or the 'Add New Attribute Set' screen where 'Jewelry' is entered and based on 'Default'.

task_completion.description: Create a new group named 'Jewelry Specifications' within the 'Jewelry' attribute set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Edit Attribute Set' page for 'Jewelry'. In the middle column ('Groups'), there should be a folder named 'Jewelry Specifications'.

task_completion.description: Assign the three newly created attributes to the 'Jewelry Specifications' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Edit Attribute Set' page for 'Jewelry'. Under the 'Jewelry Specifications' folder in the middle column, the attributes 'jewelry_material', 'gemstone_type', and 'chain_length_inches' should be present, having been dragged from the unassigned list.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent navigates the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Attributes > Product, Stores > Attributes > Attribute Set) to perform the tasks.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent running database queries or Magento CLI commands to create attributes and sets.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a real browser interacting with the Magento backend, with expected page loads and UI responses, not a mock or HTML inspector manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
1. 'jewelry_material': input type 'select' (Dropdown), options: Gold, Silver, Bronze, Platinum.
2. 'gemstone_type': input type 'select' (Dropdown), options: Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire, None.
3. 'chain_length_inches': input type 'text' (Text Field), no options.
4. Attribute Set: 'Jewelry'.
5. Group: 'Jewelry Specifications'.
All three attributes must be assigned to the 'Jewelry Specifications' group within the 'Jewelry' attribute set.
